    COOKIE SETTINGS

    We care about your privacy

    Below you´ll find detailed information about each cookie category and the possibility to customize your settings. By clicking "Accept all”, you accept all cookies and agree that we share this information with third parties. If you prefer, you can choose which cookie categories to accept or not. 

    Please keep in mind that blocking some types of cookies may impact how we can deliver and improve our services to you. Click on Save Preferences and remember, you can always change your mind later.

    If you want to learn more about cookies and why we use them, you can visit our Cookie Policy page anytime.

    Cookie Policy

    Essential Cookies

    Always Active

    These cookies are required for the website to function properly. They enable core features such as security, account authentication, and site navigation. Without them, certain parts of the website may not work as intended.

    Analytics

    These cookies help us understand how you interact with our site, including which pages you visit and how long you stay. This data allows us to improve functionality, optimize content, and enhance your overall experience. These cookies do not collect personal information.

    Targeted Ads

    These cookies enable us to show you personalized advertisements on third-party websites and platforms (such as Facebook, Google, and other ad networks) based on your browsing behavior and interests. They also help measure the effectiveness of our marketing campaigns. Disabling these cookies will not remove ads, but you may see less relevant advertising.

    Do not sell or share my personal information

    Prevents Panini America from selling or sharing your data with third parties for cross-context behavioral advertising , as defined under CCPA

    Panini Weekly Redemption Card Updates: June 1-June 12 2026

    In an effort to keep collectors updated on the status of those Panini America redemption cards that are currently being processed, like the one included in the attachments below, detailing the most recent cards being fulfilled last week. Check back every Friday afternoon for an updated list. The following list is intended to inform collectors about which redemption cards from…

    Author - paniniamerica

    12 Jun 2026

    CELEBRATE THE FIFA WORLD CUP 2026™ ON PANINI BLOCKCHAIN

    Written by: Kort Peters On Friday, June 19th at 10 am CST, Panini Blockchain will drop the FOTL packs for Prizm FIFA World Cup 2026™. All 48 participating nations will be represented in these packs. International superstars are highlighted in the set including Lamine Yamal, Christian Pulisic, Cristiano Ronaldo, Lionel Messi, Kylian Mbappe and Erling Haaland. The FOTL packs will…

    Author - Kort Peters

    12 Jun 2026

    Stay Tuned: NASCAR Instant is Always on the Air

    Written by: Kara Gates If you've ever listened to a race team communicate during NASCAR weekend, you know the radio never really goes silent. There's always another update coming, another strategy call, another moment unfolding at 190 miles per hour. That's the spirit behind the Panini NASCAR Instant program. While traditional card-in-pack releases celebrate an entire season or an entire…
